textByHash.3b312a7f7b1dfb82f3b87f88b311d5554ed02d42: Ah, hello jester. Hey! I've just noticed, you look a little similar to our new champion!
textByHash.5ba3c3c0bf26bca2603505f62dabb57373b3464a: No, of course not, that would be silly. You just...look similar.
textByHash.47dd89ac567c78a84ce0305b5313087ab85ca324: Yes, you're right of course. Anyway, I think the Burgher is in the mood for some more entertainment, so carry on through.
textByHash.57e485d7fea63bf4239c9f24e243b90f1bb963f4: Ah , the Burgher is keen to see you. Walk on through.
textByHash.5a03e881993115c682de6254d68b48dbe3bd5bc2: I expect we'll be hearing songs about the 'Slayer of the Troll King' for many years to come.
